title: Nahhh Wait You Look Tuff I'm Taking a Photo
about: Nahhh Wait You Look Tuff I'm Taking a Photo is a redraw meme format based on a webcomic by Nick Vost in which Batman tries to get Commissioner Gordon's attention, sees Gordon smoking a cigar, then says, "Nahhh wait you look tuff I'm taking a photo," and takes Gordon's photo. The comic, which notably uses the slang term "tuff," was originally posted to Vost's X / Twitter account @foolibuster on May 4th, 2026. It became the subject of redraw memes over the following weeks, including a version that replaces the Batman characters with characters from Metal Gear.
origin:
On May 4th, 2026, artist Nick Vost posted a comic to his X[1] account @foolibuster that gained over 208,000 likes and 20,000 reposts in about two weeks. The comic begins with Batman trying to get Commissioner Gordon's attention. In the second panel, Gordon is seen smoking a cigar. In the final panel, Batman is seen holding up his phone and saying, "Nahhh wait you look tuff I'm taking a photo."

On May 9th, X[2] user @evilgnomehacker posted an edit of the meme that replaces the original characters in the comic with characters from the video game Deadlock, gaining about 65 likes. This is the earliest known edit of the image.
